notes: Generated at the end of bootloader.test.ts during vitest.
Includes bootloader shell plotter cases, glxsh, and glxnano interaction frames.
consoleLines: [test] bootloader shell > stores programs on the boot disk directory
[test] bootloader shell > accepts exact filename and file-size limits and rejects the next byte/char
[test] bootloader shell > packs entries on sequential pages and records program page counts exactly
[test] bootloader shell > replacing an existing entry keeps a single directory record with the new content
[test] bootloader shell > lists boot disk files and programs
[test] bootloader shell > clr clears both the shell console and the plotter
[test] bootloader shell > supports 64 directory entries across multiple directory pages
[test] bootloader shell > runs a program from disk
[test] bootloader shell > passes a resolved file entry to ASM programs
[test] bootloader shell > passes a resolved file entry to C programs
[test] bootloader shell > accepts extra spaces around bootloader command arguments
[test] bootloader shell > clears boot arguments before a later run without file arguments
[test] bootloader shell > keeps the shell usable after error paths in cat and run
[test] bootloader shell > can return to the shell prompt after a program halts
[snapshot] bootloader-draw-preserved: report/bootloader/bootloader-draw-preserved.png (256x256, scale 2, pixels 1)
[test] bootloader shell > can return to the shell prompt without clearing the plotter
[test] bootloader shell > cats a text file from disk

[test] bootloader shell > runs bundled Linux-like userland programs from disk

[test] bootloader shell > moves a file with bundled mv

testConsoleOutputs.testName: bootloader shell > lists boot disk files and programs
testConsoleOutputs.output:
[command ls]
NodalLinux
root# 
p calc 1p
f notes 5b
root#

testConsoleOutputs.testName: bootloader shell > supports 64 directory entries across multiple directory pages
testConsoleOutputs.output:
[command cat f3f]
NodalLinux
root# 
Z
root#

testConsoleOutputs.testName: bootloader shell > runs a program from disk
testConsoleOutputs.output:
[command run calc]
NodalLinux
root# 
OK

testConsoleOutputs.testName: bootloader shell > passes a resolved file entry to ASM programs
testConsoleOutputs.output:
[command run bootcat notes]
NodalLinux
root# 
hello

testConsoleOutputs.testName: bootloader shell > passes a resolved file entry to C programs
testConsoleOutputs.output:
[command run bootcat story]
NodalLinux
root# 
abc

testConsoleOutputs.testName: bootloader shell > accepts extra spaces around bootloader command arguments
testConsoleOutputs.output:
[command run   spaced   notes]
NodalLinux
root# 
1:5

testConsoleOutputs.testName: bootloader shell > clears boot arguments before a later run without file arguments
testConsoleOutputs.output:
[bootarg sequence]
NodalLinux
root# 
1:5
NodalLinux
root# 
0:0

testConsoleOutputs.testName: bootloader shell > keeps the shell usable after error paths in cat and run
testConsoleOutputs.output:
[shell error recovery]
NodalLinux
root# 
not found
root# 
not runnable
root# 
not file
root# 
OK

testConsoleOutputs.testName: bootloader shell > can return to the shell prompt after a program halts
testConsoleOutputs.output:
[command run calc]
NodalLinux
root# 
OK

---

[shell resume after halt]
NodalLinux
root# 
OK
NodalLinux
root#

testConsoleOutputs.testName: bootloader shell > can return to the shell prompt without clearing the plotter
testConsoleOutputs.output:
[command run draw]
NodalLinux
root#

testConsoleOutputs.testName: bootloader shell > cats a text file from disk
testConsoleOutputs.output:
[command cat notes]
NodalLinux
root# 
hello
root#

testConsoleOutputs.testName: bootloader shell > runs bundled Linux-like userland programs from disk
testConsoleOutputs.output:
[command run hello]
NodalLinux
root# 
hello from /bin/hello

---

[command run bootcat readme]
NodalLinux
root# 
This is a tiny Linux-like environment for the simulator.
Programs live on the external drive and are launched with run NAME.
Use run NAME FILE to pass one resolved file argument.

testConsoleOutputs.testName: bootloader shell > copies a file with bundled cp
testConsoleOutputs.output:

NodalLinux
root# 
dest> copied
